name: Tenet | EV Financing & Refinancing
description_short: Tenet specializes in EV and Tesla financing with same-day to 48-hour funding, no fees, and approval for used vehicles that traditional banks decline.
description_long:
Tenet is an EV-focused lender that launched to address gaps in traditional auto financing for electric vehicles, particularly Tesla purchases. The company positions itself as an alternative to banks and dealerships, emphasizing speed, transparency, and inclusion of vehicles and borrowers that conventional lenders typically reject. Their core business is originating personal auto loans for new and used electric vehicles across multiple purchase channels.

Tenet offers instant rate quotes with soft credit inquiries, pre-approvals without a VIN requirement, and funding timelines of 24-48 hours—claimed to be up to 5x faster than traditional banks. Their loans carry no origination fees, no dealer markups, and transparent pricing. They finance all Tesla models (Model 3, Model Y, Model S, Model X, Cybertruck) as well as other EVs including Rivian, Hyundai, Kia, Ford, Polestar, and Nissan vehicles. Loans work across purchase channels: direct from Tesla, dealerships, or private-party sales. They explicitly finance used EVs, older model years, high-mileage vehicles, and out-of-warranty cars that many banks decline.

Tenet differentiates primarily through EV specialization and willingness to finance vehicles with higher mileage or age that traditional lenders avoid. They offer the same rates for new and used EVs (whereas banks typically charge premiums for used). Their process is entirely digital, and they coordinate directly with sellers and manufacturers to facilitate transactions. Customer reviews highlight ease of process, fast funding, responsive support, and proactive problem-solving (including outreach to manufacturers during delays).

Tenet operates as a personal auto loan provider and does not appear to offer refinancing, debt consolidation, or credit repair services despite the company name including "Refinancing." While their website emphasizes speed and ease, actual APR ranges, credit score requirements, and debt-to-income thresholds are not disclosed publicly. The company is best suited for EV buyers with established credit seeking fast, transparent financing outside traditional banking channels.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same competitive rates for new and used EVs; no premium for used vehicles
No origination fees, no dealer markups, fully transparent pricing
Financing available for high-mileage, older, and out-of-warranty EVs that banks typically decline
Soft credit inquiries for rate checks and pre-approvals (no impact to credit score)
Works across all purchase channels: direct Tesla, dealerships, and private-party sales
No VIN required for pre-approval; can lock rate while shopping
cons: No publicly disclosed APR ranges, credit score minimums, or debt-to-income requirements
Despite name including 'Refinancing,' website shows no refinancing product or offering
Limited to EV and Tesla financing only; cannot serve broader auto financing or personal loan needs
Customer reviews are exclusively positive with no independent third-party ratings visible
Funding speed claims (24-48 hours) depend on completed application and coordination with seller/manufacturer
best_for: EV and Tesla buyers with good to excellent credit seeking faster approval and funding than traditional banks
Used EV and high-mileage vehicle buyers whom banks have declined or quoted unfavorable rates
Private-party EV purchasers seeking financing outside dealership networks
Borrowers prioritizing transparent pricing and no hidden fees in auto lending
diagnosis: Tenet is best for EV buyers with established credit who need faster, more transparent financing than traditional banks and want to purchase new or used electric vehicles across dealer, direct, or private-party channels. The main caveat is that they finance only EVs—not broader personal loans or refinancing—and credit score/APR requirements are not publicly disclosed, requiring a rate check to determine eligibility.
services: EV and Tesla auto loan origination (new and used vehicles)
Instant rate quotes with soft credit inquiry (no credit impact)
Rate-lock feature while shopping for vehicles
EV financing calculator to estimate loan amounts and affordability
Financing coordination with Tesla direct, dealerships, and private sellers
Support for out-of-warranty and high-mileage EV financing
Customer support and application assistance throughout loan process
Financing for multiple EV brands (Tesla, Rivian, Hyundai, Kia, Ford, Polestar, Nissan, others)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 169 Madison Ave STE 2922, New York, NY 10016
